ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Friends of, PAC) */,
  "committee_status" TEXT /* Status of the committee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the committee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the committee */,
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing period the committee is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_filing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_period_id") REFERENCES filing_periods ("filing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for (e.g., County Council) */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the councilmanic district the candidate is running in */,
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing period the candidate is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES councilmanic_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_filing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_period_id") REFERENCES filing_periods ("filing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_address" TEXT /* Address of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contributor */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor's occupation */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor's employer */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the councilmanic district the contributor is from */,
  "is_individual" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contributor is an individual or an organization */,
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing period the contribution is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES councilmanic_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_filing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_period_id") REFERENCES filing_periods ("filing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the employer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "councilmanic_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the district */,
  "boundary_map_url" TEXT /* URL to the boundary map of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the contribution was made to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the contribution was made to */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., Check, Electronic Fund Transfer) */,
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing period the contribution is associated with */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contribution is anonymous */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the contribution */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_filing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_period_id") REFERENCES filing_periods ("filing_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_periods" (
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing period */,
  "filing_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the filing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the filing period */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the filing period is open */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Deadline date for the filing period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_limits" (
  "contribution_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution limit */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the contribution limit applies to */,
  "filing_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing period the contribution limit applies to */,
  "contribution_limit_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the contribution limit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contribution limit is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_limits_filing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_period_id") REFERENCES filing_periods ("filing_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_limits_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "is_special_election" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the election is a special election */,
  "results_announced_date" TEXT /* Date when the election results were announced */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_elections" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "primary_election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary election if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_elections" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the committee is active for the election */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id", "election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, candidate, committee) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_employers" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id", "employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_occupations" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id", "occupation_id")
)
